title: LocalTest disposable ticket build run smoke
purpose: Prove the alpha cockpit can start a real project-scoped disposable build run for a selected ticket and preserve durable SQL/events/evidence.
requiredProof: LocalTest API starts and reports an isolated test database.
Tauri browser shell starts against the LocalTest API.
A selected ticket starts a disposable run through POST /api/projects/{projectId}/tickets/{ticketId}/build-runs/disposable.
dbo.Runs contains a disposable run row with project and ticket ids.
dbo.RunEvents contains disposable workspace and command events.
At least one backend-owned dotnet command executes.
Run success or failure is visible through the project-scoped ticket build run API.
The Tauri ticket workspace shows the run review state.
Failed runs preserve workspace/log evidence for debugging.
passCriteria: Disposable run SQL proof check passes.
Normal development database probe does not find LocalTest seed rows.
